news.title: 2 Mid-Cap Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 We Ignore
news.summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.

news.title: Resmed Divests MatrixCare Business to Sharpen Focus on Connected Care
news.summary: RMD's MatrixCare sale sharpens its focus on sleep, breathing and connected care while freeing resources for AI-powered digital health.

news.title: ResMed (RMD) Sells MatrixCare To Refocus On Sleep And Respiratory Health
news.summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) has agreed to divest its MatrixCare business to a private equity buyer. The deal centers on refocusing the company around its sleep and respiratory health technologies and connected care platform. The transaction reflects a move away from post acute care software toward ResMed's core medical device and digital health operations. For investors watching ResMed, the exit from Matrix

news.title: ResMed's Q4 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
news.summary: ResMed is scheduled to post its fourth-quarter results soon, and analysts project a double-digit earnings growth.

news.title: Resmed sharpens sleep care focus with $490m software business sale
news.summary: Resmed’s decision to sell MatrixCare to PE firm Frazier Healthcare Partners comes less than a decade after its $750m acquisition of the software business.
